title: buildah bud: inconsistent io.buildah.version label
body:
`podman build` will not overwrite an existing `io.buildah.version` label in an image:
```console
$ for i in 20200929 20210223;do printf "FROM quay.io/libpod/testimage:$i\nLABEL foo=bar\n" | ./bin/podman build -t foo:$i -;done
STEP 1: FROM quay.io/libpod/testimage:20200929     <--- this image DOES NOT have an io.buildah.version label
STEP 2: LABEL foo=bar
STEP 3: COMMIT foo:20200929
--> af8d7af49af
af8d7af49afbf91e02a98437168a634d780194a3bb7b426ead4d07de9f7b4c66
STEP 1: FROM quay.io/libpod/testimage:20210223     <--- this image DOES have an io.buildah.version label
STEP 2: LABEL foo=bar
STEP 3: COMMIT foo:20210223
--> d4f925ab5fc
d4f925ab5fc808e1412df67c079232f5bcbd708e6d0ff563a3bfedc0bf39bf68

$ for i in 20200929 20210223;do echo;echo $i;./bin/podman inspect foo:$i|gron|grep -i buildah;done
20200929
json[0].Config.Labels["io.buildah.version"] = "1.19.6";      <--- CORRECT: this is the buildah version in podman
json[0].Labels["io.buildah.version"] = "1.19.6";

20210223
json[0].Config.Labels["io.buildah.version"] = "1.20.0-dev";   <--- INCORRECT: this is the version in the image
json[0].Labels["io.buildah.version"] = "1.20.0-dev";
```
This may be deliberate, but I find it surprising: my expectation is that `io.buildah.version` should be that of the buildah used to build the most recent image.

master @ 1702cbc69 on f33. As mentioned above, the `20200929` testimage does not have an `io.buildah.version` label, the `20210223` one does.

comments.body: Yes I agree this is wrong.  Could you check if this is an issue with Buildah.  I have a feeling this belongs to Buildah.

Hmmm, you're right, but I can only reproduce it with `buildah bud`, not with `buildah commit`:
```console
! Use /usr/bin/buildah (1.18.0-1.fc33) so I can know if the label gets overwritten or not
$ ctr=$(/usr/bin/buildah from quay.io/libpod/alpine:latest)
$ /usr/bin/buildah commit $ctr foo
...
$ ./bin/buildah inspect foo|gron|grep -i buildah.version                                                                                             -
json.Config = "{\"created\":\"2021-02-23T20:50:20.311812052Z\",\"architecture\":\"amd64\",\"os\":\"linux\",\"config\":{\"Env\":[\"PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin\"],\"Cmd\":[\"/bin/sh\"],\"Labels\":{\"io.buildah.version\":\"1.18.0\"}},\"rootfs\":{\"type\":\"layers\",\"diff_ids\":[\"sha256:03901b4a2ea88eeaad62dbe59b072b28b6efa00491962b8741081c5df50c65e0\",\"sha256:5f70bf18a086007016e948b04aed3b82103a36bea41755b6cddfaf10ace3c6ef\"]},\"history\":[{\"created\":\"2019-08-20T20:19:55.062606894Z\",\"created_by\":\"/bin/sh -c #(nop) ADD file:fe64057fbb83dccb960efabbf1cd8777920ef279a7fa8dbca0a8801c651bdf7c in / \"},{\"created\":\"2019-08-20T20:19:55.211423266Z\",\"created_by\":\"/bin/sh -c #(nop)  CMD [\\\"/bin/sh\\\"]\",\"empty_layer\":true},{\"created\":\"2021-02-23T20:50:21.000443901Z\",\"created_by\":\"/bin/sh\"}]}";
json.Docker.config.Labels["io.buildah.version"] = "1.18.0";
json.Docker.container_config.Labels["io.buildah.version"] = "1.18.0";
json.OCIv1.config.Labels["io.buildah.version"] = "1.18.0";     <--- all as expected
```
The above creates an image `foo` with a label we would like to overwrite. `buildah bud` will not overwrite it:
```console
$ cat Containerfile
FROM foo
RUN true
$ ./bin/buildah bud -t foo3 .
...
$ ./bin/buildah inspect foo3|gron|grep -i buildah.version                                                                                            -
json.Config = "{\"created\":\"2021-02-23T20:54:41.955735238Z\",\"architecture\":\"amd64\",\"os\":\"linux\",\"config\":{\"Env\":[\"PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin\"],\"Cmd\":[\"/bin/sh\"],\"Labels\":{\"io.buildah.version\":\"1.18.0\"}},\"rootfs\":{\"type\":\"layers\",\"diff_ids\":[\"sha256:03901b4a2ea88eeaad62dbe59b072b28b6efa00491962b8741081c5df50c65e0\",\"sha256:5f70bf18a086007016e948b04aed3b82103a36bea41755b6cddfaf10ace3c6ef\",\"sha256:a47c98b2c590d9db177a71b7fccecb921aa452afefccf659ae8ba446d5e8f740\"]},\"history\":[{\"created\":\"2019-08-20T20:19:55.062606894Z\",\"created_by\":\"/bin/sh -c #(nop) ADD file:fe64057fbb83dccb960efabbf1cd8777920ef279a7fa8dbca0a8801c651bdf7c in / \"},{\"created\":\"2019-08-20T20:19:55.211423266Z\",\"created_by\":\"/bin/sh -c #(nop)  CMD [\\\"/bin/sh\\\"]\",\"empty_layer\":true},{\"created\":\"2021-02-23T20:50:21.000443901Z\",\"created_by\":\"/bin/sh\"},{\"created\":\"2021-02-23T20:54:42.404351412Z\",\"created_by\":\"/bin/sh -c true\",\"comment\":\"FROM localhost/foo:latest\"}]}";
json.Docker.config.Labels["io.buildah.version"] = "1.18.0";
json.Docker.container_config.Labels["io.buildah.version"] = "1.18.0";
json.OCIv1.config.Labels["io.buildah.version"] = "1.18.0";    <--- BAD! This should be 1.20.0-dev !
```
However, the following _does_ overwrite the label:
```console
$ ctr2=$(./bin/buildah from foo)
$ ./bin/buildah commit $ctr2 foo2
...
$ ./bin/buildah inspect foo2|gron|grep -i buildah.version                                                                                            -
json.Config = "{\"created\":\"2021-02-23T20:50:50.644357265Z\",\"architecture\":\"amd64\",\"os\":\"linux\",\"config\":{\"Env\":[\"PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin\"],\"Cmd\":[\"/bin/sh\"],\"Labels\":{\"io.buildah.version\":\"1.20.0-dev\"}},\"rootfs\":{\"type\":\"layers\",\"diff_ids\":[\"sha256:03901b4a2ea88eeaad62dbe59b072b28b6efa00491962b8741081c5df50c65e0\",\"sha256:5f70bf18a086007016e948b04aed3b82103a36bea41755b6cddfaf10ace3c6ef\",\"sha256:5f70bf18a086007016e948b04aed3b82103a36bea41755b6cddfaf10ace3c6ef\"]},\"history\":[{\"created\":\"2019-08-20T20:19:55.062606894Z\",\"created_by\":\"/bin/sh -c #(nop) ADD file:fe64057fbb83dccb960efabbf1cd8777920ef279a7fa8dbca0a8801c651bdf7c in / \"},{\"created\":\"2019-08-20T20:19:55.211423266Z\",\"created_by\":\"/bin/sh -c #(nop)  CMD [\\\"/bin/sh\\\"]\",\"empty_layer\":true},{\"created\":\"2021-02-23T20:50:21.000443901Z\",\"created_by\":\"/bin/sh\"},{\"created\":\"2021-02-23T20:50:51.000484893Z\",\"created_by\":\"/bin/sh\",\"comment\":\"FROM localhost/foo:latest\"}]}";
json.Docker.config.Labels["io.buildah.version"] = "1.20.0-dev";
json.Docker.container_config.Labels["io.buildah.version"] = "1.20.0-dev";
json.OCIv1.config.Labels["io.buildah.version"] = "1.20.0-dev";    <--- GOOD! buildah overrides previous label
```
I'm going to try transferring the issue to buildah.
